# PERF-195 negative: return the error from a synchronous call
lang: go
file: PERF-195-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"errors"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = w
	_ = r
	// Inline the call; the caller decides what to do with
	// the error. No goroutine, so no log.Fatal in a worker.
	if err := connect(); err != nil {
		_ = err
	}
}

func connect() error { return errors.New("not implemented") }
